items.title: Water 0,33 l
items.description: Crisp and refreshing, this water offers a straightforward, refreshing taste, perfect for quenching your thirst any time of day.

items.title: Sparkling Water 0,33 l
items.description: Featuring crisp, clean carbonation and a pure, invigorating taste, this sparkling water is perfect for a revitalizing drink on its own or as a sophisticated mixer for your favorite beverages.

items.title: Coca-Cola 0,25 l
items.description: Indulge in the timeless taste of Coca-Cola with a 250ml bottle. This classic soda is known for its distinctive, refreshing flavor and effervescent kick.

items.title: Coca-Cola light 0,25 l
items.description: This iconic soda offers the same refreshing flavor you love, but with fewer calories and no sugar.

items.title: Fanta 0,25 l
items.description: Bursting with vibrant fruit flavors, this refreshing soda delivers a sweet and tangy taste that's perfect for any occasion.

items.title: Sprite 0,25 l
items.description: This iconic lemon-lime soda offers a crisp, effervescent taste that’s both refreshing and invigorating.

items.title: Tonic 0,25 l
items.description: Crisp and refreshing, this tonic features a balanced blend of quinine and a hint of citrus, making it the perfect mixer for cocktails or a delightful standalone drink.

items.title: Red Bull 0,25 l
items.description: This iconic energy drink combines a unique blend of caffeine, taurine, and B-vitamins to boost your vitality and focus.
